# AIM Foundation (Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation)

Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation (AIM Foundation) is a leading NGO in Kolkata dedicated to uplifting underprivileged communities through Education, Healthcare, Women Empowerment, and Environmental Sustainability.

## Mission
To empower marginalized communities by providing access to essential services and fostering self-reliance.

## Core Initiatives
- Educational: Innocent Smiles (Art/Music), EduAccess (E-learning), Empower English, DigiEmpower, VidyaShakti (AI-powered).
- Healthcare: CureLine (Rural), CareCircle (Urban), ChildFirst (Pediatric), Detect (Cervical Cancer), SightHope (Vision), OralScan.
- Empowerment: SuiDhaga (Tailoring), Krishti (Entrepreneurship), CycleSafe (Menstrual Health).
- Sustainability: GreenRoots (Reforestation), TideShield (Mangroves), Roots of Change (Education).
- Relief: Disaster Management, Relief to the Underprivileged.

## Getting Involved
- [Donate](https://aimindia.org.in/individual-donation)
- [Volunteer](https://aimindia.org.in/volunteering)
- [Internships](https://aimindia.org.in/internship)
- [CSR Partnerships](https://aimindia.org.in/corporate-social-responsibility)
